# Frontend skills index

Canonical path: `.cursor/skills/frontend/`.

| Skill | ID | Owner (registry) | Summary |
| ----- | -- | ---------------- | ------- |
| **state-management** | `frontend/state-management` | `frontend-lead` | Zustand / Jotai / RTK selection, server vs client state, Query, hydration. |
| **nextjs-patterns** | `frontend/nextjs-patterns` | `frontend-framework-manager` | App Router, RSC, streaming, parallel/intercepting routes, middleware, ISR/SSG/SSR, runtime limits. |
| **component-testing** | `frontend/component-testing` | `lead-qa-architect` (primary backing); co-owned with `frontend-lead` | Storybook, Vitest + Testing Library, interactions, snapshots, axe, RTL assertions. |
| **rtl-layout** | `frontend/rtl-layout` | `rtl-specialist` | Logical CSS, `dir`, Tailwind RTL, mirroring, fonts, numerals, mixed-direction strings. |
| **performance-budget** | `frontend/performance-budget` | `frontend-performance-manager` | CWV budgets, bundles, lazy loading, images, Arabic fonts, prefetch, Lighthouse CI. |
| react-architecture | `frontend/react-architecture` (legacy id: `nezam-react-architecture`) | `lead-frontend-architect` / FE swarm | RSC-first React/Next architecture defaults. |

After edits, run `pnpm ai:sync` and `pnpm ai:check`.
